## Reviewer checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Lint and type-check pass (`uv run ruff check && uv run mypy src`)
- [ ] README is still accurate after this change
- [ ] No data files committed
- [ ] No claim made beyond what the code can defend
